images.caption:
Figure 2:Overview of one benchmark session.
The evaluated agent interacts with a simulated user agent in a turn-based loop, while the user agent tracks hidden intents and assigns each intent a terminal status ascompleted,inferred, orprovided.
The session ends when all hidden intents have reached terminal status.

Figure 3:CompandProcfor (a, b, c) three representative task workflow categories following the fine-grained taxonomy in Tab.LABEL:tab:task_taxonomyof App.A.3, and (d) the overall average across all tasks. The gray dashed line indicatesComp=Proc.
Figure 4:Relationship between average interaction turns per task and model-levelProc. Each point denotes one model.

Figure 5:Ablation on the final task of each strong dependency group: six per user, aggregated across five roles.Oursuses the original trajectories, whilew/o dependenciesremoves preceding sessions from the same group.
